task_completion.description: Verify Deal Name and Organization Name are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'DataForge Enterprise Analytics Rollout' in the Deal Name field and 'DataForge Analytics' in the Organization Name field on the Vtiger CRM deal creation or details page.

task_completion.description: Verify Contact Name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Kevin Wu' selected or entered in the Contact Name field.

task_completion.description: Verify Amount and Expected Close Date are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '240,000' (or 240000) in the Amount field and '2026-07-15' in the Expected Close Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify Sales Stage and Probability are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Proposal/Price Quote' selected in the Sales Stage dropdown and '55' in the Probability field.

task_completion.description: Verify the deal description is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text starting with 'Enterprise-wide deployment of analytics platform...' in the Description text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the deal has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final Deal details view (not the edit form), a success notification, or the deal appearing in the Deals list view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM application, not a terminal window or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL queries, PHP scripts, or curl commands should be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual CRM form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs should be inside the Vtiger CRM 'Create Deal' or 'Edit Deal' form fields, not in a generic text editor or a mock webpage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Deal Details - Name: 'DataForge Enterprise Analytics Rollout', Organization: 'DataForge Analytics', Contact: 'Kevin Wu', Amount: 240000, Close Date: '2026-07-15', Sales Stage: 'Proposal/Price Quote', Probability: 55. Description must include: 'Enterprise-wide deployment of analytics platform across 5 business units. Includes 200 user licenses, custom dashboard development, data warehouse integration, and 12-month premium support. Competitive against Tableau and Power BI.'
